backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the service desk app; defines data types and CRUD operations for clients, jobs, parts, and labor rates, with access control, blob storage, and Stripe integration mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, focused on fixing form submission handlers in ClientDetailPage and JobDetailPage.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the app's page and component structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC Service Desk', mounting the app at the root div and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines all TanStack Router routes for the app, explicitly registering static routes like /clients/new and /jobs/new before their dynamic counterparts, and provides the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, main content outlet, and a fixed bottom navigation bar; handles auth redirects to login or profile-setup based on identity and profile state.
frontend/src/components/SignatureCapture: A React component that renders a canvas-based signature pad allowing users to draw, save, or skip their signature, using the useSignaturePad hook and a mutation to store the result.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for CRUD operations on backend entities (clients, jobs, labor rates, parts, user profiles, etc.) and exposes an owner-check utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useSignaturePad.ts: A hook that attaches mouse and touch drawing event listeners to a canvas ref, tracks empty state, and provides clear and PNG-byte-export utilities for a signature pad.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Weekly calendar view that displays jobs grouped by day in EST timezone, with drag-and-drop reordering, cost breakdowns (diagnostic fee, labor, tax), and navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a single client record, supporting save and delete operations with confirmation dialog and navigation back to the clients list.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Searchable list page showing all clients with phone, address, and a Google review link button, plus navigation to add or edit individual clients.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview displaying job/client metric cards, recent jobs list, and labor rates, with owner-only sections and a personalized greeting.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page for parts with inline add/edit forms, delete confirmation dialogs, low-stock warnings, and search filtering.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Renders a printable/downloadable invoice preview for a given job, including parts, labor line items, tax calculation, and a client signature capture pad with blob URL management.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Full job detail and edit page supporting both new job creation and editing existing jobs, with labor line items, parts, photos, shopping items, and invoice navigation.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists all jobs grouped and filterable by status (Open, In Progress, Complete), displaying job cards with client name, date, and status badge.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting to home on success and showing loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Two-step onboarding page where new users enter their name and optionally capture a signature, then navigate to the home screen.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing labor rates (create, edit, delete) and configuring Stripe payment integration, restricted to the owner principal.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes. Supports sessionStorage-backed persistence and safe removal of sensitive params (e.g., admin tokens) from the address bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and animations (accordion, fade-in). Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 31) describing the ICP/Motoko + React mobile service desk app for Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC, including architectural notes, known issues (owner principal mismatches, broken CRUD flows), and a list of existing and planned features.
